channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
之前我想在 Reddit 上做一些自己内容的推广，随时被封贴，随时被警告，感觉这是个什么鬼地方。
现在开始在上面发一些游戏的感受，完全没有什么想要增长、推广的动机，却突然发现它的魅力了。上面都是各种...
item.description:
之前我想在 Reddit 上做一些自己内容的推广，随时被封贴，随时被警告，感觉这是个什么鬼地方。
现在开始在上面发一些游戏的感受，完全没有什么想要增长、推广的动机，却突然发现它的魅力了。上面都是各种同好，极其友善，而且非常好玩，充满人味，完全没有 AI 的感觉，怪不得大家喜欢。 https://t.co/xMQ2LP66N9
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 3
item.author: @bearliu

item.title:

item.description:

item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
GPT Image 2 Prompt：
The painting contains only one face: that of an elegant young female model with...
item.description:
GPT Image 2 Prompt：
The painting contains only one face: that of an elegant young female model with little grin. The line that runs from her hair parting to seamlessly split her face in half is designed to look like violently torn paper. The painting is perfectly, completely and forcibly divided into two parts by one flowing lines that resemble tears in the paper: —Left side: Futuristic elegant pop art style with strategic cutie smile subtly. —Right side: Hyper realistic beautiful natural style with smiling subtly. —Right side: Her beautiful natural upper-body is drowned by totally beautiful marine-blue geometric halftone circles. style.
The background is futuristic dreamy. The entire screen is effectively bright and maintains natural vividness. The high resolution, fine details, and soft blur are reminiscent of an electron microscope.
--- @dotey | ❤️ 5 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 1542
item.author: @dotey
